package.name: skidpad
package.description: Deterministic skidpad: the FS-Rules figure-eight as a fixed pre-computed reference path (skidpad_reference), a per-tick driver that tracks arc-length progress from the EKF pose and emits the forward window + finish flag (skidpad_driver), and a thin ROS runtime (skidpad_planner_runtime) that path_planning_node delegates to in skidpad mode. No perception, no cone map — the track is fully rule-defined. Pure-Python core is unit-tested off-node.
